verdicts.reasoning: The description accurately reflects the offerings of Shopify as an ecommerce platform, which is supported by the homepage content.
The evidence from the official documentation confirms the listed authentication methods, including OAuth, access tokens, API key, and JWT.
The official guide supports the claim that creating an app requires a Partner account and provides app credentials, confirming the self-serve nature of access.
The documentation confirms the existence of both Admin REST and GraphQL APIs, supporting the claim of broad API surface coverage.
The documentation indicates that developers can build and test integrations today, confirming the buildable status without any blockers.
